\tzpentry{ID3650}{Acoustic Kaluza-Klein Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3650 introduces Acoustic Kaluza-Klein Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{d}{dt}\left[\mathcal{H}_{\text{mag}} + \frac{\lambda_g}{\mu_0}\mathcal{H}_{\text{acoustic}} + \sum_{m=1}^{\infty}\frac{m}{R_{KK}}\mathcal{H}_m^{KK} + \mathcal{H}_{\text{grav}}\right] = 0 \end{equation}
